title: Opening for Production Engineer at JK Tyre

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at JK Tyre
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
